name: get_element_parameters
desc: Stage 3: get parameter values for selected parameter names (instance + optional type/family fallback).

parameters.name: elementIds
parameters.description: Optional JSON array of element IDs. Defaults to current selection.

parameters.name: parameterNames
parameters.description: JSON array of parameter names to export.

parameters.name: includeTypeParams
parameters.description: Include type/family fallback when instance param missing (default true).
